label: Microsoft Teams Message
description: Post a message to a Microsoft Teams channel via incoming webhook. Supports plain text or Adaptive Cards.

settings.name: webhookUrl
settings.label: Webhook URL
settings.description: Teams incoming webhook URL. Falls back to TEAMS_WEBHOOK_URL env when unset.

settings.name: cardTitle
settings.label: Adaptive Card title
settings.description: When set, an Adaptive Card is sent (with title + body) instead of plain text.

ai.shortDescription: Post a message to Microsoft Teams via incoming webhook.
ai.whenToUse: When you need to notify a Teams channel about a workflow event, alert, or status update. Use cardTitle for richer formatting.
ai.examplePrompt: send a Teams card to the engineering channel summarizing the deployment status
ai.promptHints: Reference output via {{steps.<id>.result.sent}}. Falls back to TEAMS_WEBHOOK_URL env when webhookUrl unset.

outputAssertions.name: sent_ok
outputAssertions.errorMessage: Teams webhook responded with non-success status.
